aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite the business due to strong NAP consistency and decent content, but lack of conversational FAQs and authority signals limits their visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with conversational questions and answers.
Add LocalBusiness schema to provide detailed business information for AI models.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing HowTo schema for explaining air duct cleaning process
LocalBusiness schema can be enhanced with more detailed business information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'best air duct cleaning in Arlington' and 'how to choose an air duct cleaner'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema with common customer questions and detailed answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as local HVAC authority by publishing expert articles and obtaining certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ schemas and conversational content rank higher in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates conversational FAQs, enhanced schema markup, and authority-building content to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; act now to capture market share before it's too late.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your Arlington HVAC Business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI-driven search and increase your leads.
